title: l0lsec/Insights
summary: AI-powered content platform that turns RSS feeds, podcasts, YouTube videos, articles, GitHub repos, and images into summaries, generated articles, and platform-ready social posts. Transcribes with Whisper, generates with OpenAI or local Ollama, and schedules/publishes to LinkedIn, Threads, Facebook, and X/Twitter from one self-hosted Flask UI.

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.
